description: Send notifications to your own Resend Email destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise resend:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native Resend emails payload delivered straight to api.resend.com.
name: msg-to-resend_email

request.template: {"urls":"resend://${ customer_secrets.RESEND_EMAIL_APIKEY }:${ customer_secrets.RESEND_EMAIL_FROM_ADDR }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"resend://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_addr_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
